author: SeverinDiederichs
body:
This PR updates AdePT to v0.3.0 including the following changes:

- the interfacing AdePT libraries were renamed to `adept_g4integration` and `adept_g4integration_final`
- `covfie` and `g4vg` are declared as a dependency, to avoid an additional build of them within AdePT (for `g4vg` this requires an additional CMake flag, for `covfie` it does not, as AdePT only builds it if it was not provided).
- removing of the deprecated cmake flag `ADEPT_ASYNC_MODE`, which is now the only available transport backend in AdePT
- removing of the CMake flag for `-DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF`, as it has no effect. AdePT is build as a static library if Geant4 is provided as a static library and as a shared library, if Geant4 is provided as a shared library. In case both a static and a shared Geant4 is provided (as it is the case in CMS), AdePT is built as a static library.
title: [G4ADEPT] update AdePT specs to v0.3.2
